Video.summary: Debbie is in for a shocking surprise when she catches her boyfriend, Terrance, sneaking around with her twin sister.
Video.title: Young vs. Goodwin

Video.summary: Sarah is suing her former friend for the bail money that she posted for him.
Video.title: Bail Bonds Break Bonds

Video.summary: When a wife sues her own husband, the gloves come off and there are no rules...accept his. Now find out who wins when Judge Karen rules on him.
Video.title: My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!

Image.alt: My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!
My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!
My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!

Video.summary: Yuri she said Bryan promised her a big bucks photobook, but when her it failed, their party petered out.
Video.title: The Party is Over

Video.summary: Natash is suing her younger sister for damages from to her home from wild parties that she threw.
Video.title: House Party

Video.summary: Once beer buddies, these former friends feud over a miscommunication that led to a botched beer run and a wrecked car.
Video.title: The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!

Image.alt: The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!
The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!
The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!

Video.summary: Deputy Payne responds to a vehicle on fire with a teenager trapped inside.
Video.title: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Image.alt: Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves
Just Can't Save Them All from Themselves

Video.summary: Deputy Payne exposes the jumbled and dysfunctional mind of a habitual alcoholic.
Video.title: Drunk as a Skunk

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt evacuates homeowners during the Sand Fire.
Video.title: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Image.alt: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Video.summary: The Western El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team shines a light on the destruction of our public land by illegal commercial Mexican cartel grows.
Video.title: Marijuana vs. the Environment

Video.summary: A scandalous secret and a polygraph test alter the course of Ceia and Luis' relationship.
Video.title: Stewart vs. Abrew

Video.summary: Gloria McPherson sues photographer Aston Watson for $600, claiming he botched her wedding by failing to deliver on services, including a second photographer and an album. Aston defends, blaming her behavior and even her guests' looks.
Video.title: Wedding Photo Fiasco

Video.summary: A woman confronts her long-lost father to uncover the truth about her paternity and reclaim her identity.
Video.title: Brown vs. Smith

Video.summary: The Cutlers' compatibility test helps Victor and Keisha settle a dispute over ugly women in the bedroom.
Video.title: Leaks vs. Holley

Video.summary: Secret social accounts and suspicious behavior have Kashmir asking the Cutlers if this relationship can be saved.
Video.title: Thornton vs Jones

Video.summary: The ashes of a deceased pet have exes Tianie and Abner rehashing issues from their recent breakup.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Jahnasia confronts Kelechi about his sudden emotional distance and possible betrayal after years of planning a future together.
Video.title: Arnold vs. Ijomah

Video.summary: A man says his girlfriend's actions don't match her words, which makes him suspect that she's cheating on him.
Video.title: Jackson vs. King

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: Llewellyn Clark sues ex-girlfriend Tyronica Munn for $1,400, claiming she stole it after a fight. Tyronica says she spent it on a hotel, champagne, and a massage, asserting the money was owed since Llewellyn freeloaded in her apartment.
Video.title: Ex Spending Spree

Video.summary: Lenore Stellmacher sues her former friend, Elizabeth Ruiz, for $920, claiming she loaned her money that was never repaid. Elizabeth denies borrowing anything and accuses Lenore of being jealous of her new relationship.
Video.title: Friendship Fireworks Over a Loan

Video.summary: Rachael sues ex-roommate Jean for $750 after he gave her a bounced check for her security deposit. She claims he caused chaos by moving 15 people in, while he accuses her of theft and promiscuity. Both bring explosive allegations to court.
Video.title: Roommate Sex Refusal

Video.summary: Samuel and Melissa sue Dean and Bashaar for $1,721, alleging an assault at a red light, including damage to their car. Dean claims Samuel provoked the incident and that there was no damage.
Video.title: Taking Your Anger Out on a Car

Image.alt: Taking Your Anger Out on a Car
Taking Your Anger Out on a Car
Taking Your Anger Out on a Car

Video.summary: Robert sues property manager Jorge for $10,000, claiming harassment, unlawful entry, and invasion of privacy. Jorge denies the accusations, says he's just doing his job, and countersues for $10,000, alleging he's the one being harassed.
Video.title: Nosey Landlord

Video.summary: Shawn sues Andrew for $4,545, claiming Andrew's dog bit him, injuring his finger and knuckle. Andrew argues Shawn's unleashed dog started the scuffle and insists Shawn's own dog caused the bite.
Video.title: Your Dog Took a Chunk out of My Finger!

Image.alt: Your Dog Took a Chunk out of My Finger!
Your Dog Took a Chunk out of My Finger!
Your Dog Took a Chunk out of My Finger!

Video.summary: Cassandra sues her ex, Quentin, for $4,775, claiming he cheated with her sister, skipped out on rent, and stole furniture. Quentin denies owing anything, saying Cassandra is suing out of spite over his new relationship with her sister.
Video.title: My Live-In Boyfriend Was Messing With My Sister

Image.alt: My Live-In Boyfriend Was Messing With My Sister
My Live-In Boyfriend Was Messing With My Sister
My Live-In Boyfriend Was Messing With My Sister

Video.summary: A woman hired her friend of 15 years to do her son's and husband's tax returns, but says the friend failed to complete them, so she's suing for a refund.
Video.title: H&R Best Friend

Video.summary: Ashley is suing her former friend Terra, for not returning her dog after caring for it while she was in rehab.
Video.title: Tearful Canine Custody Battle

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after she found a provocative message from another woman in her live-in boyfriend's phone, he became violent, and she was forced to hide in a closet; she sues him for repayment of loans; he says she was the aggressor.
Video.title: Live-In Liar

Video.summary: Sarah sues her ex-husband for rent, saying their marriage fell apart due to trust issues and infidelity.
Video.title: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Image.alt: Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads
Putting a Roof Over 5 Kids’ Heads

Video.summary: Sherrita thinks her Aunt Crystal spends all her money on clothes so she's suing for car payments and repairs.
Video.title: Pay Up

Video.summary: A woman accuses her cousin of crashing her car with the plaintiff's children inside.
Video.title: Mathis Take the Wheel

Video.summary: The plaintiff says her sister tried to push her out of a car and strangle her with a seat belt.
Video.title: Sibling Rivalry

Video.summary: Jorge brings his wife to court for damaged property after constantly accusing him of cheating.
Video.title: Done with the Accusations

Video.summary: A woman says her former roommate moved out after three months because he wanted more from their relationship than she was willing to give, and she sues him for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Unrequited Rent

Video.summary: Judy is suing her niece for 12 months of unpaid rent. Cassandra says there was never a deal to pay any rent.
Video.title: Unconditional Rent

Video.summary: Did their office friendship go too far? Are her misconduct claims a cover for the money she owes?
Video.title: Gross Misconduct

Video.summary: Johnny is suing his former friend for costs stemming from a botched dog-sitting deal.
Video.title: Sin and Tonic

Video.summary: First, these cousins clash over cash then they spar over cars and finally they moan over loans.
Video.title: Clash of the Cousins

Video.summary: Linda says John wrote an IOU for his DUI but he said he was drunk during signing.
Video.title: Too Sauced to Sign

Video.summary: WENET plans and executes a large Methamphetamine cartel raid.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Meth House

Video.summary: An uncooperative felon tests the patience of the SED.
Video.title: Special Enforcement Detail Work

Video.summary: Deputies save a dog trapped in a vehicle parked in the sun.
Video.title: The Car Driver

Video.summary: Deputy Payne shows us a typical day for the life of a deputy in El Dorado County.
Video.title: All in A Night's Patrol

Video.summary: A troubled 15-year-old boy goes through the booking process.
Video.title: Scared Straight? We Hope So!
